S.FORM: = Emomali Rahmon = Mntucing hngkawas 1952 idas 10 jiyax 5 ka Emomali Rahmon ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Tajikistan ta sayang o kiya ka Emomali Rahmon, pnaah hngkawas 1994 idas 11 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = əmomali ɾaħmon = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * ka əmomali ɾaħmon ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan taɟikistan ta sajaŋ o kija ka əmomali ɾaħmon, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Emomali Rahmon = Mntucing hngkawas 1952 idas 10 jiyax 5 ka Emomali Rahmon ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Tajikistan ta sayang o kiya ka Emomali Rahmon, pnaah hngkawas 1994 idas 11 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = əmomali ɾaħmon = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * ka əmomali ɾaħmon ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan taɟikistan ta sajaŋ o kija ka əmomali ɾaħmon, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
